title: Goal Contracts and Observable Completion · Failure Case: Goal Revision
summary: Turn a vague long-running objective into an executable goal contract. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops goal revision increment in a measurable goal and done-condition specification. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Revise goals explicitly when new evidence changes scope or feasibility.
Separate current objective, durable constraints, and optional next work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
